comment: Manifest-driven plugins (issue neokapi/neokapi#438). The legacy plugins.json next to this file describes gRPC bridge plugins (Okapi); they are migrated to this schema in phases 8-9.

okapi-bridge.description: Okapi Framework filters (57+ formats) — IDML, HTML, XLIFF, PO, YAML, OpenXML, Markdown, …
okapi-bridge.author: Neokapi <hello@neokapi.dev>

sat.description: Segment text into sentences with the SaT (Segment any Text) ML model
sat.author: Neokapi <hello@neokapi.dev>
